financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is making more money each year and keeping its expenses in check.
They are smart with their money, avoiding debt and putting funds into areas that help them grow.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Low Risk
bullets: The company is at risk of cyberattacks because it relies heavily on digital systems.
Unpredictable raw material prices and global trade changes make it hard to keep costs steady.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and managing its resources.
It also has strong leadership and fair practices, which help it run smoothly and responsibly.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is in great financial health with no traditional loans, which means it manages its money wisely.
It has plenty of cash and pays good dividends, showing it values and rewards its shareholders.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The company clearly explains its plans and how it is doing, making it easy to understand their goals and challenges.
They are good at staying ahead in most of their markets, even when people are buying less overall.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: The company has a clear plan with specific goals for growing its business and improving its brands.
While the strategy is strong, there's not much detail on how they plan to expand into new areas.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Hindustan Unilever is doing well financially and has a plan to keep growing by focusing on new and popular products.
The company is good at handling risks and cares about sustainability, making it a strong choice for future investment.
